text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the autumn Tenno Sho draws closer, signs of
fatigue begin to appear.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Gahhhh... It's like my brain and my legs are all
stuck...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: What's wrong?! We've only one run lap.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ughhh... I dunno. It's like the everyday drain is
catching up with me. Like I've got the chills or
something.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Uhhh... Crash!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Helios! Are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We bring Daitaku Helios to the infirmary to rest.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
With that training routine, it was only a matter of
time until something like this happened.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Why?! I'm doing the same routine. How come
she's the only one passed out?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
You may share the same ambitions, but you do
not share the same constitution. Daitaku Helios
is—
choice_data_list: Ah. It's because she's a miler.
Ah. It's because she's a miler.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Precisely.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Daitaku Helios is best at miles and sprints. Her
performance tops out at around 2,000 meters.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
If she has been doing medium-distance training
with you ever since the Takarazuka Kinen, this
was only to be expected.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
No way... She didn't complain even once when we
were running together over the summer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: So how come...
choice_data_list: She must've been holding it in.
She must've been holding it in.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even if she was in pain, she was doing it for her
friend. That's the kind of person Daitaku Helios
is.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It is... possible she was holding it in.
But if I were to hazard a guess...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ah, actually... I just totes forgot about it. ♪
Whoopsie! ☆

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Yes. That is what I thought.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
What are you doing up?! You should be resting!
And what do you mean you forgot?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Y'know how when you get super into something
and your brain just kinda shuts down?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I was so happy running with you that my mind just
went blank! ☆ I wasn't even thinking about the
distances we were running. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh, Helios...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't exactly self-sacrifice, but it does seem
Daitaku Helios was pushing herself for the sake of
their friendship.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Helios? I was thinking, maybe I should run in
the autumn Tenno Sho by myself...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I don't wanna put you through any more trouble.
So...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: You wanna run by yourself?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: So that's how it is, huh? This is it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daitaku Helios stares up at the ceiling and opens
her mouth...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yeaaah, I don't think so. That's totally outta the
question.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: What? Why?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
No offense, but I don't think you can really go off
all by yourself.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I mean, it's the freakin' Tenno Sho. Everyone
there's gonna bring it, and the pressure's gonna
be unreal.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, Palmster... There's no way you're ready
to party solo yet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: W-well...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Even if you said you could, there's no way I'd
believe you. After all...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I know you, Palmster. ♪ Better than you know
yourself. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daitaku Helios sees straight through her. Because
she treasures their friendship as much as she does,
she knows Mejiro Palmer better than anyone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer still doesn't have the peace of mind
necessary to enjoy running in the autumn Tenno
Sho by herself...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Plus! All this tough as nails training I've been
doing with you has made me super strong. ★

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Plus plus, there's something I'm really looking forward to seeing when we come out the other side of this!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Once we take first and second place together, I
wanna see you standing proud and yelling "Eat
your hearts out!" to everyone. ♪

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
No doubt it's gonna hit way different seeing that
from right next to you. ☆ There's no way I'm
giving up that seat. ♪

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: After all, you're my number one bestie! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Helios...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after passing out, it seems Daitaku Helios's
feelings are resolute as ever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But will her body be able to hold out till the end?
I give Ikuno Dictus an inquiring look.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
If I were a doctor, I would not recommend that
she continue. However... I am not a doctor.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I think it is important to take an individual's
feelings into account. That is how I like to
manage things.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Like." There's the keyword we've been chasing
this entire time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What Mejiro Palmer likes. What Daitaku Helios
likes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They need to shake off their obligations, remove
the walls around their hearts, and chase after the
desires that are in danger of being buried. Right
here and now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In that case...
choice_data_list: Do your best in the autumn Tenno Sho, Helios.
Do your best in the autumn Tenno Sho, Helios.

text_block_list.name: Palmer and Helios
text_block_list.text: Yasss, Trainer!
choice_data_list: Let's prioritize what you two would like to do.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Awww yeah! ☆ You totally get it! Trainer got the
vibes! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Now, listen up, Palmer! I'm gonna run with you
until you can have just as much fun running all by
yourself! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: And I won't stop till you can. ★ Cross my heart!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, sis. I'm counting on you. If you're there
with me, I know I got this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Let's slay the autumn Tenno Sho! We've got this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so they maintain their balance atop the
tightrope of their friendship. The rope they're
walking is thin... but extraordinarily strong.
